features.description: W3-1: Fix Distributed remap guard clause from && to || so partial matches are not rewritten

layers.name: structural
layers.command: grep -n 'db_val != src_db || table_val != src_table' src/restore/remap.rs | head -1
layers.fail_message: Guard clause at line 647 not changed from && to ||

layers.name: runtime
layers.justification: Pure function fix verified by unit tests -- no runtime binary execution needed

features.description: CLAUDE.md updated for watch/ and server/ modules with new public API and handler changes

layers.name: structural
layers.command: test -f src/watch/CLAUDE.md && test -f src/server/CLAUDE.md && echo PASS || echo FAIL
layers.fail_message: One or more CLAUDE.md files missing

layers.name: behavioral
